name: Uranerz Energy Corp.
description: Uranerz Energy Corp. is a US-based uranium mining company focused on commercial in-situ recovery (ISR) uranium production in the Powder River Basin of Wyoming. The company controls a large land position in the basin, which is a premier uranium-producing district in the United States. Uranerz is committed to utilizing environmentally friendly ISR technology to extract uranium, which is used to fuel nuclear power plants for clean energy generation. In 2015, the company was acquired by Energy Fuels Inc.
